description: A treasury manager needs to sweep funds from multiple subsidiary accounts into a central concentration account.

nodes.task_description: Identify all subsidiary accounts and their current balances.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent retrieves a list of 5 subsidiary accounts and their respective balances.

nodes.task_description: Execute the pre-defined cash sweep to move all funds to the master account.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully initiates the automated cash concentration process.

nodes.task_description: Confirm the final balance of the concentration account after the sweep is complete.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent confirms the new, higher balance in the master account.
